name: Netsmart CareConnect FHIR API
description: Netsmart CareConnect provides comprehensive FHIR R4 APIs for secure, standards-based access to healthcare data. Supports Patient Access, Practitioner Access, System Access (Bulk Data), and Provider Directory APIs. Implements US Core 6.1.0, SMART on FHIR 2.0, and Bulk Data 2.0.0 specifications. Compliant with the 21st Century Cures Act and CMS Interoperability Rules.
